name: Homing Strikes
description: If you make an attack roll with your Psychic Blades and miss the target, you can roll one Psionic Energy die and add the number rolled to the attack roll. If this causes the attack to hit, you expend the Psionic Energy die.

mechanics.action: roll 1 Psionic Energy die and add the result to the attack roll
mechanics.condition: if the modified attack roll hits the target
mechanics.resource: expend the used Psionic Energy die
